advanced_machine_features.description: Defines advanced machine features, such as the number of threads per core, to customize the instance's CPU configuration.

can_ip_forward.description: Indicates whether the instances created from this template can forward packets. Set to true to allow packet forwarding, enabling instances to act as gateways.

confidential_instance_config.description: Configuration settings for enabling Confidential VM features, requiring hardware that supports Confidential Computing.

description.description: Specifies an optional description for the regional instance template to provide additional context or details.

disk.description: Defines the boot disk and additional disks for the instance template, including parameters such as disk type, size, and auto-delete settings.
disk.type: list(object({auto_delete: optional(bool),boot: optional(bool),device_name: optional(string),disk_name: optional(string),disk_size_gb: optional(number),disk_type: optional(string),interface: optional(string),labels: optional(map(string)),mode: optional(string),provisioned_iops: optional(number),provisioned_throughput: optional(number),resource_manager_tags: optional(map(string)),resource_policies: optional(list(string)),source: optional(string),source_image: optional(string),source_snapshot: optional(string),type: optional(string),disk_encryption_key: list(object({kms_key_self_link: string})),source_image_encryption_key: list(object({kms_key_self_link: string,kms_key_service_account: optional(string)})),source_snapshot_encryption_key: list(object({kms_key_self_link: string,kms_key_service_account: optional(string)}))}))

guest_accelerator.description: Specifies the type and number of accelerator cards to attach to the instance; requires compatible machine type and region.

instance_description.description: Defines the metadata description for instances created from the template. Maximum length is 255 characters.

key_revocation_action_type.description: Defines the action to take when a key is revoked, such as disabling or deleting instances; must be a supported key revocation type.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize resources, typically used for metadata or filtering; must comply with label key and value format requirements.

machine_type.description: Specifies the type of machine to use for the instance template; must be a valid Google Cloud machine type.

metadata.description: Key-value pairs to assign as metadata for the instance template; used to provide custom data or configuration.

metadata_startup_script.description: Defines the startup script to be executed on instance boot, allowing customization of instance behavior. Must be a valid script or command.

min_cpu_platform.description: Specifies the minimum CPU platform required for the instances, ensuring compatibility and performance requirements.

name.description: Unique name for the regional instance template; must be compliant with Google Cloud naming conventions.

name_prefix.description: Specifies the prefix for the name of the regional instance template, which must be unique within the project and region.

network_interface.description: Defines the network interfaces for the regional instance template, including subnet, network, and access configurations.
network_interface.type: list(object({internal_ipv6_prefix_length: optional(number),ipv6_access_type: optional(string),ipv6_address: optional(string),name: optional(string),network: optional(string),network_ip: optional(string),nic_type: optional(string),queue_count: optional(number),stack_type: optional(string),subnetwork: optional(string),subnetwork_project: optional(string),access_config: list(object({nat_ip: optional(string),network_tier: optional(string),public_ptr_domain_name: optional(string)})),alias_ip_range: list(object({ip_cidr_range: string,subnetwork_range_name: optional(string)})),ipv6_access_config: list(object({external_ipv6: optional(string),external_ipv6_prefix_length: optional(string),name: optional(string),network_tier: string,public_ptr_domain_name: optional(string)}))}))

network_performance_config.description: Defines the network performance settings for the instance, including bandwidth tier and additional configurations.

reservation_affinity.description: Specifies the type and key of reservation to target for the instance, ensuring it uses reserved resources if applicable.

resource_manager_tags.description: Defines key-value pairs to organize resources in Google Cloud, typically for billing or management purposes; must adhere to GCP tag naming conventions.

resource_policies.description: List of resource policy IDs to attach to the instance template, such as those for scheduling or disk replication.

scheduling.description: Defines the scheduling options for the instance, including whether it should be preemptible or automatically restarted on failure.
scheduling.type: list(object({automatic_restart: optional(bool),availability_domain: optional(number),instance_termination_action: optional(string),min_node_cpus: optional(number),on_host_maintenance: optional(string),preemptible: optional(bool),provisioning_model: optional(string),termination_time: optional(string),local_ssd_recovery_timeout: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number})),max_run_duration: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number})),node_affinities: list(object({key: string,operator: string,values: list(string)})),on_instance_stop_action: list(object({discard_local_ssd: optional(bool)}))}))

service_account.description: Specifies the service account to be used by instances created from the template, allowing access to Google Cloud APIs. Must be formatted as an email address.

shielded_instance_config.description: Configuration for Shielded VM features, specifying security settings like Secure Boot, vTPM, and Integrity Monitoring.

tags.description: Specifies network tags to associate with the instance, used for firewall rules and network routing.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeout durations for creating, updating, or deleting the regional instance template.
